text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My training for the Japanese Oaks has begun.
2,400 meters might be too long a distance for
me, because it's really, really difficult to run...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And then... my weight goes down. I talk to Trainer
about it, and we decide that I should take some
time off training.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to worry Trainer, but I'm glad I came
clean about it. Trainer is so kind, and even takes
me out to eat!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Having this happen before the Japanese Oaks
isn't exactly comforting, but I have to stay strong
and work hard until it's time for the race.
